name.description: Skill name (lowercase with hyphens, max 64 chars)

argument-hint.description: Hint shown to the user about expected arguments when invoking the skill

effort.description: Relative effort/thoroughness hint for the agent

model.description: Recommended model ID (e.g., claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)

allowed-tools.description: Restrict tool access while this skill runs

disable-model-invocation.description: If true, the model cannot auto-invoke this skill; it must be called explicitly

user-invocable.description: If true, this skill is exposed as a user-invocable slash command

context.description: Additional files or paths loaded as context when the skill runs

agent.description: Named subagent that executes this skill

paths.description: Glob patterns scoping where this skill applies

shell.description: Shell interpreter used if the skill runs shell code
